title: The Wrong Bus
content: After work, Daniel hurried to catch the bus home. He entered quickly without checking the number carefully. Twenty minutes later, he looked outside and realized something was wrong. The streets were unfamiliar, and the bus was moving in the opposite direction from his neighborhood. Daniel laughed at his mistake and asked the driver for help. At the next stop, he changed buses and finally returned to the correct route. Although he arrived home much later than usual, the unexpected trip made his evening more interesting.
